steps.title: Interpret minimum and translate the expression
steps.content:
Minimum value of $x$ means $x$ is bounded below, so we use the $\ge$ form. Now translate 12 less than 6 times another number $n$:
  • 6 times $n$ equals $6n$
  • 12 less than $6n$ means $6n - 12$

steps.title: Write the inequality
steps.content:
Since the minimum value of $x$ is $6n - 12$:
$$x \ge 6n - 12$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
